subcodes.first_line: Blessed are the souls who, in the Day of Manifestation, have attained unto the Word of God; naught can equal even a single token thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفوسیکه در یوم ظهور بکلمه الله فائز گشتند برابری نمینماید بیک
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
